rationale: Educ. Code §12.113 governs open-enrollment charter school charter grants. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote:
Each charter the commissioner grants for an open-enrollment charter school must:
(1) satisfy this subchapter; and
(2) include the information that is required under Section 12.111
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
